claim_boundary: Internal sampled high-fidelity synthetic campaign only; not operational POD; not external validation; no learned model training or checkpoint inference.
diagnostic_definition: For each visible station update, compute z - h(x_pre) inside the UKF/AUKF recursion immediately before that station's update, wrap the azimuth residual, whiten by the nominal measurement-noise standard deviations only, and sum squared components. This excludes post-update filtered histories, excludes cross-filter posterior NIS, and excludes the predicted-state covariance term in S.

row_checkpointing.flush_policy: append, flush, and fsync after each completed realization

selected_cells.name: hifi_base
selected_cells.label: Base high-fidelity
selected_cells.truth_acceleration: accel_hifi(r, epoch_unix) (two-body + J2..J4 + luni-solar) + exponential-atmosphere drag
selected_cells.estimator_acceleration: configured compact recursive-filter dynamics from configs/experiment.yaml

selected_cells.name: hifi_extended
selected_cells.label: Extended high-fidelity
selected_cells.truth_family: J2..J6 plus third-body and diurnal density truth
selected_cells.truth_acceleration: accel_hifi_extended(r, epoch_unix) (two-body + J2..J6 + luni-solar) + exponential drag with one-sided diurnal density bulge
selected_cells.estimator_acceleration: configured compact recursive-filter dynamics from configs/experiment.yaml

hifi_extended.label: Extended high-fidelity
hifi_extended.truth_family: J2..J6 plus third-body and diurnal density truth
